name: I-Naloxone
description: Umphikisi we-opioid receptor oqhudelanayo. Ihlehlisa ngokushesha ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula okubangelwa i-opioid, ukuthulisa, kanye ne-analgesia. Ukuqala IV: 2 min, IM: 5 min, IN: 8-13 min. Ubude besikhathi bufushane kunama-opioid amaningi -- ukuphinda umthamo kungadingeka.
dose: 0.4-2 mg IV/IO/IM/IN. Phinda u-q2-3 min njengoba kudingeka. Ubukhulu be-10 mg. Intranasal (IN): 2mg ikhala ngalinye.
warnings: Ubude besikhathi sokusebenza (30-90 min) bufushane kunama-opioid amaningi -- isiguli singaphinda siphuze i-narcotize. Gada okungenani ihora elingu-1 ngemva komthamo wokugcina.
Kwenyusa ukuhoxa okunamandla kwe-opioid -- kungabangela ukuyaluza, i-tachycardia, i-pulmonary edema ezigulini ezithembele ku-opioid.
Izohlehlisa i-analgesia -- isiguli singase silwisane nobuhlungu.

obstetric.note: Umphikisi we-opioid receptor oqhudelanayo. Ihlehlisa ngokushesha ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula okubangelwa i-opioid, ukuthulisa, kanye ne-analgesia. Ukuqala IV: 2 min, IM: 5 min, IN: 8-13 min. Ubude besikhathi bufushane kunama-opioid amaningi -- ukuphinda umthamo kungadingeka.
